basic_details.short_information: Utkal University Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Research Associate (RA). Candidates with Ph.D Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 06-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Utkal University official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Chemistry, Chemical Sciences, or Materials Science

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Utkal University Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
